title: poacynum ellipticifolium
intro: Poacynum ellipticifolium, also known as Mexican Buckthorn, is a small shrub native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Poacynum ellipticifolium include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
